_note: Standard per-contact cost estimates for campaign tactics. Edit any value to reflect your market, vendor quotes, or org rates. Loaded at runtime by finance_agent.py and messaging.py.

canvassing.description: Includes canvasser labor, literature, and overhead per door attempt

phones.description: Includes dialer platform, volunteer coordination, and data per completed contact

mail.description: Print and postage per piece. Flat design fee applies once per mail program, not per piece.

text.description: Peer-to-peer texting platform cost per outgoing message

digital.description: Average CPM-based rate across Facebook, Instagram, and display. Minimum applies per platform per flight.
